fields.acceptance_criteria: E2E passes for mode switch, websocket reconnect+continuity, sandbox policy enforcement, multi-client observation of one session; Playwright screenshots captured for transient UI; manual verification in external Chromium browser at a documented, recorded resolution.
fields.title: [agent-harness][CH11] E2E + Playwright + manual browser verification evidence
fields.validation_plan: Fast: cargo check across agent-harness crates. Primary: e2e suite (mode switch, reconnect, policy, multi-observer) + Playwright. Manual: external Chromium browser at documented resolution, screenshots attached (MCP Playwright preferred, repo fallback). Failure logs: target/test-logs/ + Playwright artifacts.
